rationale: Poisson-noise desaturation of the t0029 length sweep on t0022 is deprioritised because t0043 (Nav1.6 + Kv3 + NMDA restoration) and t0044 (Schachter re-test) address the same underlying pinning problem by a different route: fixing the channel inventory and restoring NMDA rather than adding Poisson background release. If t0043 and t0044 recover the expected peak firing rate and Schachter signature, the Poisson rescue becomes a secondary comparison rather than a primary experiment. Keeping the suggestion active at medium priority.
